scripts.build: rm -rf dist && pnpm run build:cjs && pnpm run build:esm
scripts.build:esm: tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && mkdir -p dist/esm && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > dist/esm/package.json
scripts.dev: sh -c 'mkdir -p dist/esm && printf "{\"type\":\"module\"}\n" > dist/esm/package.json; tsc -w -p tsconfig.json --preserveWatchOutput --watchFile dynamicprioritypolling --watchDirectory dynamicprioritypolling & tsc -w -p tsconfig.esm.json --preserveWatchOutput --watchFile dynamicprioritypolling --watchDirectory dynamicprioritypolling & wait'
